attacks.name: Channeled Palm Strike
attacks.description: Channel your inner strength and perform an avoidable normal attack. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to Stun the Enemy for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn(s) on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an <avoidable> normal attack. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Shadowshot
attacks.description:
Quickly fire a targeted arrow that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. On hit, inflict Bleed that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0} damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s, and apply Immobilize (Can't Attack) for ${onHitEffect1turns} turns.
Then, Slink Into Shadows and gain +${onHitEffect2modValue0}% Global Evasion, +${onHitEffect2modValue1}% Damage Reduction and -${onHitEffect2modValue2}% Attack Interval for ${onHitEffect2turns} turns.
If effects are already active, perform a regular attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Quickly fire an arrow, dealing <damage> and <onhitEffect>. If effects already active, perform a regular attack instead.

attacks.name: Barrage
attacks.description:
Barrage the Enemy with a hail of arrows that each deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage.
Arrows have a ${onHitEffect0chance}% to apply 1 stack of Hobbled (Attack Interval is increased by 1% per stack, up to 25 stacks).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> <count> times. On use, <prehitEffect>.

attacks.name: Quick Reload
attacks.description:
Grease the track of your crossbow, gaining -${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Ranged Attack Interval for ${preHitEffect0turns} turns.
If buff is already active, perform a regular attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You grease the track of your crossbow, gaining <prehitEffect>. If buff is already active, perform a regular attack instead.

attacks.name: Big Smash
attacks.description: Smash the enemy for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. If you hit, you gain Barbaric Strength, giving you ${onHitEffect0modValue} stacking Flat Melee Max Hit until the End of the Fight.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You make an attack that deals <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Eradication
attacks.description: You snuff the life force out of the Enemy, dealing damage equal to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}%-${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of their current HP, and heal for ${lifesteal}% of the damage dealt. Uses Prayer Points.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an attack that deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Relentless Fury
attacks.description: Make ${hitCount} attacks, each dealing a small percentage of your Maximum Hit: 1st—${attackDamageMaxValue0}%; 2nd—${attackDamageMaxValue1}%; 3rd—${attackDamageMaxValue2}%; 4th—${attackDamageMaxValue3}%; and 5th—${attackDamageMaxValue4}%. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to decrease your Damage Reduction by ${onHitEffect0modValue}% for the rest of the fight and to inflict a 1-turn Stun on the Enemy.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> times, dealing <damage> and <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Barrage of Flaming Death
attacks.description: Your fists take on an aspect of the eternal flame, Ragnar. Make ${hitCount} attacks, each dealing a small percentage of your Maximum Hit: 1st—${attackDamageMaxValue0}%; 2nd—${attackDamageMaxValue1}%; 3rd—${attackDamageMaxValue2}%; and 4th—${attackDamageMaxValue3}%. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance (doubled if the Enemy is Burning) to inflict Deadfire, a powerful Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the Enemy's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> times, dealing <damage> and <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Spiked Carapace
attacks.description:
Your gloves instantly grow to become a spiky shell around your body for ${preHitEffect0turns} turns. While protected by this carapace, you have +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Reflect Damage, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% chance to ignore Slow Effects, and +${preHitEffect0modValue2}% Flat Damage Reduction.
If this buff is already active, make a normal attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: On use, <preHitEffect>. If buff already active, make normal attack.

attacks.name: Stonewall
attacks.description:
Driving your fists into the rocky earth, you conjure a stone barrier, granting you +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Flat Damage Reduction for ${preHitEffect0turns} turns.
Then hurl the stone at the Enemy, dealing damage equal to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}%-${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your Defence level. Unavoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Puts up a wall that <prehitEffect>. Then, deal <damage>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Lich's Madness
attacks.description:
Engulf yourself in umbral flame while your extremities turn to jet ice shards, inflicting Burn and Frostburn on yourself, then strike ${hitCount} times.
On the 1st attack, deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal (doubled if Enemy is Burning).
On the 2nd and 3rd attacks, deal damage equal tio ${attackDamageMaxValue1} + ${attackDamageMaxValue2}% of your Magic level.
Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Burn which deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the Enemy's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s, and Frostburn for ${onHitEffect2turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> damage. On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Fist of the Winter Winds
attacks.description: Harness the winter winds, striking for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage + ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your Magic level. On a hit, ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Freeze for ${onHitEffect0turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An <avoidable> attack that deals <damage> damage. On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Toxic Needle Flurry
attacks.description:
Fire ${hitCount} small needles from your knuckles in a flurry that deal up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage each (Avoidable).
On a hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Fire <count> small needles that deal <damage> damage each (<Avoidable>). On a hit <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Cyclone Fist
attacks.description: Surround yourself in wind for ${duration}s, while dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage ${hitCount} times. Grants +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Global Evasion and +${preHitEffect0modValue1} Flat Reflect Damage until the end of the attack.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Surrounds <attacker> in wind for <duration>, while dealing <damage> <avoidable> damage <count> times. On use, <prehitEffect>.

attacks.name: Shatterstrikes
attacks.description:
Harnessing crystalline power, make two swift strikes against the Target, each dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% your maximum hit (doubled if the Enemy is Crystallized).
On hit, ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Crystallization (Target is stunned and takes +50% Damage) for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn(s), and ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to apply Crystal Sanction (Target's next attack deals no damage).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make two <avoidable> attacks that deal <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Crystal Strike
attacks.description:
Focus crystalline energy into your knuckles to land a powerful strike.
On hit, deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Crystallization (Target is stunned and takes +50% Damage) for 1 turn.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an <avoidable> attack that deals <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Pandora's spark
attacks.description: Inflict a Triple-charged random effect on yourself and the Enemy

attacks.name: Mounted Strike
attacks.description: Attack normally, on hit instruct your companions to perform an unavoidable attack each.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> for <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Concussive Smash
attacks.description:
Smash into your enemy's armour, dealing up to (100 + Enemy DR)% Normal Hit damage.
On a hit, inflicts Daze for 2 turns and has a ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to inflict Broken. Avoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Smash into your Enemy's armour, dealing up to 100% + (Attacker DR%) Normal Hit damage (Eg. 25% DR = up to 125% normal hit damage). On a hit, <hitEffect>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Devastating Slice
attacks.description: Deliver your blade unto the Enemy with a wide, arcing slash that strikes ${hitCount} times for up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage per hit. On hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% Chance to inflict Shaken (-${onHitEffect0modValue}% Global Evasion and -${onHitEffect0modValue1)%) Total Resistance on the Enemy for ${onHitEffect0turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <hitCount> for <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Practiced Lunge
attacks.description: Perform an unavoidable lunge that ignores Enemy Resistance. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an <avoidable> attack that ignores Enemy Resistance and deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Whirling Manoeuvre
attacks.description:
Whirl your polearm around, attacking ${hitCount} times for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage each.
While attacking, gain +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Dodge Chance and reflect Enemy attacks for ${preHitEffect0modValue0}% of their damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Gain <preHitEffect>, and attack <hitCount> times for <damage>.

attacks.name: Bloodlust
attacks.description:
Let out a bloodcurdling warcry. Gain 1 stack of Bloodlust which gives you: +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Lifesteal, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Max Hit, +${preHitEffect0modValue2} Flat Damage to Bleeding targets, -${preHitEffect0modValue3}% Attack Interval, and +${preHitEffect0modValue4}% Self Damage on Hit.
Each stack of Bloodlust also gives the Enemy +${preHitEffect1modValue0}% Bleed Damage Taken, -${preHitEffect1modValue1}% Max Hit, -${preHitEffect1modValue2}% Resistance, and +${preHitEffect1modValue3}% Attack Interval.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You become filled with a lust for blood. On use, <preHitEffect>.

attacks.name: Death Approaches
attacks.description: Strike your enemy's weak spot, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their max HP.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Avoidable> attack for <damage>.

tooltipSpans.value: +1 stack on Hit and Evade, -1 stack on Miss and Being Hit (min 1 stack, max 20)

combatEffectTemplates.description: Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that decrease in strength each time the character hits with an attack. The effect is removed if the applied modifiers reach zero.
Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character evades an attack, up to a maximum value.

Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character hits with or evades an attack, up to a maximum value, and decrease in strength each time the character misses with or is hit by an attack.

${value}% chance to convert a successful hit from the Target into a miss per 10,000 Enemy Accuracy Rating

conditionalModifiers.description: Unlock Dueling Stance
When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 10% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval.
Unlock the Practiced Lunge Special Attack
If your Shield slot is empty, triple this level's bonuses and gain +10% chance to pierce Enemy Resistance.

When wielding Thrusting Swords, gain a 5% bonus to Dodge Chance, Convert Miss Into Hit, and Attack Interval. If you also have nothing equipped in your Shield slot, triple that bonus and gain +10% Chance to ignore Enemy Resistance.
Chance to Parry when an enemy misses you based on defense values
+10% chance (20% without a shield) to apply Disarm to enemy on Hit

weaponMasteries.flavorText: Simply brutal and brutally simple implements

At the Start of the Fight, apply Intimidated and Shaken to the enemy for 3 turns
